summary_en: 15,200 shares acquired, ¥21.0M spent (May 22–31, 2026). Cumulative to 2026-05-31: 15,200 shares, ¥21.0M. Authorization limit: 450,000 shares (5.49% S/O), ¥380M, execution window May 22, 2026–Mar 31, 2027, market purchase via broker.
title_en: Notice of Status of Acquisition of Own Shares (Progress Report)
translation_en_brief:
DYNIC Corporation filed a progress report on its share buyback program on 1 June 2026. The company acquired 15,200 shares at a total cost of ¥21,019,400 during the period 22–31 May 2026 via open-market purchase through a broker on the Tokyo Stock Exchange.

This acquisition is part of a larger authorization approved by the board on 15 May 2026. The full program permits acquisition of up to 450,000 shares (5.49% of issued shares excluding treasury stock) for a maximum of ¥380,000,000, with an execution window of 22 May 2026 to 31 March 2027. The buyback is conducted under Article 156 of the Companies Act, as applied by Article 165(2) provisions in the articles of incorporation.

As of 31 May 2026, cumulative acquisitions under this authorization total 15,200 shares and ¥21,019,400, representing approximately 3.4% of the authorized share count and 5.5% of the authorized budget consumed.
